childrens.name: HW pointed extension with buckle and five round holes, buckle appointed-
childrens.en: HW pointed extension with buckle and five round holes, buckle appointed-
childrens.jap: HW pointed extension with buckle and five round holes, buckle appointed-

childrens.name: HW slender round sword head lock eye nail buckle, with a spacing of 3.0cm and 1 nail buckle,and a waist width of 5.0cm must be selected
childrens.en: HW slender round sword head lock eye nail buckle, with a spacing of 3.0cm and 1 nail buckle,and a waist width of 5.0cm must be selected
childrens.jap: HW slender round sword head lock eye nail buckle, with a spacing of 3.0cm and 1 nail buckle,and a waist width of 5.0cm must be selected
childrens.nameFull: The waist surface is glued with a spinning lining (including the inner part of the sword head), HW slender round sword head lock eye nail buckle, with a spacing of 3.0cm and 1 nail buckle (a total of 2 buckles), corresponding to the zipper position with upper and lower double hooks. The waist surface is flat and 5.0cm away from the round sword head, and a 3.5cm long string strap is added in the middle of the waist surface (fixed to the waist surface with a handpick), a special clean board, and a waist width of 5.0cm must be selected
childrens.enFull: The waist surface is glued with a spinning lining (including the inner part of the sword head), HW slender round sword head lock eye nail buckle, with a spacing of 3.0cm and 1 nail buckle (a total of 2 buckles), corresponding to the zipper position with upper and lower double hooks. The waist surface is flat and 5.0cm away from the round sword head, and a 3.5cm long string strap is added in the middle of the waist surface (fixed to the waist surface with a handpick), a special clean board, and a waist width of 5.0cm must be selected

childrens.name: Add HW square head adjustment pliers at the waist (special clean plate, with a net length of 6.5cm before and after the side seam)-
childrens.en: Add HW square head adjustment pliers at the waist (special clean plate, with a net length of 6.5cm before and after the side seam)-
childrens.jap: Add HW square head adjustment pliers at the waist (special clean plate, with a net length of 6.5cm before and after the side seam)-

childrens.name: Add HW square adjusted tab with buckle at the back middle waist-
childrens.en: Add HW square adjusted tab with buckle at the back middle waist-
childrens.jap: Add HW square adjusted tab with buckle at the back middle waist-

childrens.name: Add HW pointed adjusted tab on the back middle waist, two buttons at both sides, totally 4 buttons
childrens.en: Add HW pointed adjusted tab on the back middle waist, two buttons at both sides, totally 4 buttons
childrens.jap: Add HW pointed adjusted tab on the back middle waist, two buttons at both sides, totally 4 buttons
childrens.nameFull: Add HW sharp angle adjustment loops at both ends of the back waist, hook the loops around the special clean plate, and manually insert hidden clips at the left mouth. Align the center of the loop and fix it in the center of the waist with a vertical pressure line on the middle seam. Lock one eye at each end of the loop, nail it according to the lock eye position, and then order one buckle each at a distance of 3CM (a total of 4 buckles)
childrens.enFull: Add HW sharp angle adjustment loops at both ends of the back waist, hook the loops around the special clean plate, and manually insert hidden clips at the left mouth. Align the center of the loop and fix it in the center of the waist with a vertical pressure line on the middle seam. Lock one eye at each end of the loop, nail it according to the lock eye position, and then order one buckle each at a distance of 3CM (a total of 4 buckles)
